testsuite.name: Chrome Headless 147.0.0.0 (Windows 10)

property.name: browser.fullName
property.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) HeadlessChrome/147.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

testcase.name: DraftReport should create
DraftReport showNoSelection should be true when no division is selected
DraftReport showNoSelection should be false when a division is selected
DraftReport showNoSelection should be false when All Divisions sentinel is selected
DraftReport showReport should be false when no division is selected
DraftReport showReport should be true when a division is selected and not loading
DraftReport showReport should be false while loading
DraftReport groupedByDivision should return empty array when no players
DraftReport groupedByDivision should return a single group for a specific division
DraftReport groupedByDivision should group by division when All Divisions is selected
DraftReport groupedByDivision should sort groups alphabetically by division name
DraftReport groupedByDivision should place multiple players in the correct group
DraftReport effect: getDraftReport should call getDraftReport when both season and division are set
DraftReport effect: getDraftReport should not call getDraftReport when only season is set
DraftReport effect: getDraftReport should not call getDraftReport when only division is set
DraftReport effect: getDraftReport should pass null divisionId when All Divisions sentinel is selected
DraftReport formatDob should format ISO date string as mm/dd/yyyy
DraftReport formatDob should zero-pad single-digit month and day
DraftReport formatDob should return empty string for null
DraftReport formatDob should return empty string for undefined
DraftReport print should call window.print()
DraftReportService should be created
DraftReportService getDraftReport should fetch players for season without division
DraftReportService getDraftReport should fetch players for season and division
DraftReportService getDraftReport should set loading false and clear players on error
DraftReportService clearPlayers should clear the players signal

testsuite.system-out: Chrome Headless 147.0.0.0 (Windows 10) INFO: '[LOCAL]', '[DraftReportService] Fetching draft report from:', 'http://localhost:7071/api/DraftReport/1' ,Chrome Headless 147.0.0.0 (Windows 10) INFO: '[LOCAL]', '[DraftReportService] Fetching draft report from:', 'http://localhost:7071/api/DraftReport/1/2' ,Chrome Headless 147.0.0.0 (Windows 10) INFO: '[LOCAL]', '[DraftReportService] Fetching draft report from:', 'http://localhost:7071/api/DraftReport/1' ,Chrome Headless 147.0.0.0 (Windows 10) INFO: '[LOCAL]', '[DraftReportService] Fetching draft report from:', 'http://localhost:7071/api/DraftReport/1'
